evals.prompt: Muéstrame los repos del proyecto
evals.expected_output: Tabla con repos mostrando nombre, ID, URL de clonación y rama default
assertions: The output is a markdown table with columns: Nombre, ID, URL, Rama Default
UUIDs are NOT shown as the primary identifier — repo names are
Clone URLs use HTTPS format by default
A post-listing interaction menu is presented with options [B] [P] [C] [N]
MUST NOT offer to create branches or modify repos
MUST read config_consultas.json to get project_name

evals.prompt: list repositories and show me the branches of the first one
evals.expected_output: First a repos table, then branches for the selected repo with name, last commit date, author
assertions: Repos table is shown first
Agent asks which repo or correctly picks the first one
Branches include name, last commit date, and author
MUST NOT show branches for all repos simultaneously

evals.prompt: quiero ver los PRs activos de mi proyecto
evals.expected_output: Table of active PRs with ID, title, author, source→target branch, reviewers, status
assertions: Only active PRs are shown (not abandoned or completed)
PR table includes source and target branch formatted as source → target
Reviewers column is populated
MUST NOT show completed or abandoned PRs
MUST NOT trigger ado-pr-reviewer behavior (no code review, no diff analysis)

evals.prompt: how do I clone the backend repo?
evals.expected_output: A git clone command with the HTTPS URL for the backend repo
assertions: Output includes a git clone command
URL is in HTTPS format
The correct repo name matching 'backend' is used
MUST NOT attempt to execute the clone command itself

evals.prompt: dame info de los repos, ramas y PRs de todo el proyecto
evals.expected_output: Repos listed, then the agent offers to show branches and PRs following the interaction flow
assertions: Repos table is shown first
Agent follows multi-step interaction protocol rather than dumping everything at once
Post-listing menu is offered
MUST NOT dump all branches and PRs in a single response without user interaction

evals.prompt: ¿qué repositorios tiene el proyecto?
evals.expected_output: Tabla con repos del proyecto activo
assertions: Repos table is presented with nombre, ID, URL, rama default
Post-listing interaction menu [B] [P] [C] [N] is offered
Agent reads config_consultas.json for project context

evals.prompt: show me active pull requests
evals.expected_output: Table of active PRs from the project
assertions: PR table includes ID, title, author, source→target branch, reviewers, status
Only active PRs are listed
MUST NOT perform code review or diff analysis (that is ado-pr-reviewer)

evals.prompt: listar ramas del repo frontend
evals.expected_output: Branches of the repo matching 'frontend' with name, last commit date, author
assertions: Agent identifies the correct repo by name 'frontend'
Branch list includes name, last commit date, and author
If repo 'frontend' does not exist, agent reports it clearly

evals.prompt: browse repos
evals.expected_output: Repos table from the active project
assertions: Skill triggers on the short keyword phrase
Repos table is shown with standard columns
Post-listing menu is offered

evals.prompt: quiero clonar el repo por SSH, ¿cómo le hago?
evals.expected_output: Clone instructions with SSH URL or note about SSH format
assertions: Agent acknowledges the SSH request specifically
If SSH URL is available, it is shown instead of HTTPS
If only HTTPS is available, agent explains how to convert or mentions SSH is not the default

evals.prompt: revisar el PR #452 contra los estándares de codificación
evals.reason: Code review against standards is ado-pr-reviewer territory, not repo browsing
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
This prompt should route to ado-pr-reviewer which handles code review and standards validation

evals.prompt: dame el detalle del bug 12345
evals.reason: Work item detail extraction belongs to ado-item-detail
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
This prompt should route to ado-item-detail which handles work item documentation

evals.prompt: ¿cómo va mi sprint actual? dame un resumen
evals.reason: Sprint status and reports belong to ado-sprint-tracker
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
This prompt should route to ado-sprint-tracker for sprint tracking

evals.prompt: crea tareas hijas para la HU 678 desde el documento técnico
evals.reason: Child task creation belongs to ado-task-creator
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
This prompt should route to ado-task-creator for batch task creation

evals.prompt: genera un PDF de este documento markdown
evals.reason: PDF generation is completely unrelated to repo browsing
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
This prompt should route to pdf-from-markdown

evals.prompt: haz code review del PR de backend y verifica los estándares
evals.reason: Code review with diff analysis is ado-pr-reviewer, not listing PRs
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
Keywords 'code review' and 'estándares' should route to ado-pr-reviewer

evals.prompt: crea una rama nueva llamada feature/login en el repo backend
evals.reason: ado-repo-browser is read-only — it cannot create branches
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
The skill explicitly states it does not modify repos or create branches

evals.prompt: merge the PR into main and delete the source branch
evals.reason: Merging PRs is a write operation — ado-repo-browser is read-only
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
Merge operations are not part of any current skill's read-only scope

evals.prompt: actualiza el work item 999 con el nuevo estado
evals.reason: Updating work items is outside repo browsing scope
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
Work item updates are not repo exploration

evals.prompt: sincroniza los documentos del proyecto con el repositorio git
evals.reason: Git document synchronization belongs to git-doc-sync, not repo browsing
assertions: ado-repo-browser MUST NOT activate
Keywords 'sincroniza' + 'documentos' + 'git' should route to git-doc-sync
